module top_module(input signed [31:0] a, input signed [31:0] b, input op, output reg signed [31:0] result);always @(*) begin
    if(op == 0) begin
        result = a + b;
    end else begin
        result = a - b;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result = a; // This should never be executed
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: result = a; // This should never be executed
